sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Twin-stick shooter controls
special_mechanics.description: Core gameplay mechanic allowing independent control of movement and shooting direction using dual joysticks on arcade cabinet or mapped to controller buttons on SNES (A, B, X, Y buttons laid out directionally)

special_mechanics.name: Arena-based level design
special_mechanics.description: Single-screen combat arenas with enemies entering via passages on four edges in waves; no backtracking allowed between completed areas

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. This is a twin-stick shooter arcade game, not a traditional platformer despite platform being listed as 'platformer'. Game focuses on arena combat with enemy waves rather than character movement physics. No detailed physics documentation available in provided sources. Movement and gravity mechanics not documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Smash T.V. (SNES)
